Literary fiction

The Lantern of Aldridge Bay

by Eleanor Finch

132 reviews SKU: BK-01-HC
$16.00 $20.00 Save 20%

A lighthouse keeper's daughter unravels a century of letters left unsent along a fog-bound northern coast — a luminous debut about memory, tides, and the stories families keep in the dark.

Readers also bought

Frequently bought together

+
+

Bundle price

$49.75

When the last keeper of the Aldridge Bay light dies, his daughter Maren returns to a coast she swore she'd left for good. In the lantern room she finds a tin of letters — a hundred years of correspondence the keepers gathered from the tide but never sent on.

As Maren reads, the bay gives up its quiet history: shipwrecks and rescues, feuds and reconciliations, and a single unanswered question that has waited three generations for someone to come home and ask it. The Lantern of Aldridge Bay is a debut of rare warmth — a novel about the stories we keep in the dark, and the small, stubborn lights we leave burning for one another.

Written in luminous, unhurried prose, Eleanor Finch's first novel has already drawn comparisons to the great coastal storytellers. It is a book to be read slowly, by a window, as the weather turns.

TitleThe Lantern of Aldridge Bay
AuthorEleanor Finch
ISBN-13978-1-9000000-1-2

Publication date10 February 2026
Pages352

4.5 / 5

  • RH Rosa H. Verified 3 weeks ago

    The kind of book you press into a friend's hands

    I read the last fifty pages in one sitting and then sat very still. Finch writes weather and grief better than almost anyone working today. A quiet triumph.

  • DM Daniel M. Verified 1 month ago

    A slow burn, in the best way

    Takes its time to find its feet, but by the halfway mark I was completely under its spell. The letters framing device is beautifully handled.

Good to know

Delivery & returns

  • Free standard shipping on orders over $40. Standard delivery arrives in 3–5 working days; express in 1–2.
  • 30-day returns. Changed your mind? Send any unread book back within 30 days for a full refund.
  • Carefully packed. Every order ships in recyclable, rigid book mailers so covers arrive crease-free.
